1: And this is is the blessing, wherewith Moses the man of God blessed the children of Israel before his death.
2: From his right hand went went a fiery law for them.
3: Every one Every one shall receive of thy words.
4: Even Even the inheritance of the congregation of Jacob.
5: And And the tribes of Israel were gathered together.
6: And let not not his men be few.
7: And be thou an help to him to him from his enemies.
8: And with And with whom thou didst strive at the waters of Meribah;
10: And whole burnt sacrifice upon thine altar.
11: And of them that hate him, that they rise not again.
12: And he shall dwell between his shoulders.
13: And for the deep that coucheth beneath,
14: And for the precious things put forth by the moon,
15: And for the precious things of the lasting hills,
16: And upon the top of the head of him that was separated from his brethren.
17: And they are are the thousands of Manasseh.
19: And of of treasures hid in the sand.
20: And teareth the arm with the crown of the head.
23: Possess thou the west and the south.
24: And let him dip his foot in oil.
25: And as thy days, so shall so shall thy strength be be .
26: And in his excellency on the sky.
27: And shall say, Destroy them them .
28: Also his heavens shall drop down dew.
29: And thou shalt tread upon their high places.
